examples: The waitress brings over some congratulatory glasses of champagne, courtesy of the restaurant.
He sent Kim a congratulatory letter.
Officials were self-congratulatory about how well the day had gone.
Averbukh received a congratulatory call from Israel's foreign minister Shimon Peres after his victory.
But folks who constantly agree with one another grow insular, self-congratulatory, and not a little lazy.
